recipe-costing-foundation-certification.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'current_price') at ingredientLineCostEur on prep sub-recipe line

finalDecision.label: FOUNDATION CONDITIONALLY CERTIFIED
finalDecision.justification: Procurement→operational normalization is deterministic and recipe costing uses invoice overlay (never price_history). 11/12 VL-E2E recipes pass with 33/34 lines at €0.02 tolerance. One recipe-layer multipack failure (Ginger beer un vs ml overlay) blocks full recipe certification. Foundation economics sound; remaining gaps are match read-cutover config, VL history/catalog sync artifacts, and one match-lifecycle architectural gate.

procurement.evidence: 51/51 invoice lines persist qty×price≈total; 40 matched ingredients; Gorgonzola/Guanciale align PDF truth post re-extract

operationalNormalization.evidence: 37/40 ingredients pass op normalization in foundation audit; multipack/weight/volume paths deterministic

ingredientCatalog.evidence: Pack-level purchase_quantity intentional for multipacks; 7 ingredients show catalog op≠line op by design; produce items (Ovo/Tomilho) stale denominators

historicalPricing.evidence: Ovo/Tomilho store pack-level new_price; 12+ multi-invoice delta drift; Prosciutto orphan from suggested match; recipe path never reads history

validationEngine.evidence: 52 items / 38 findings (matching only); stale gorgonzola/guanciale rows no longer flagged — fixes landed

matching.evidence: Architecture sound; VITE_MATCH_LIFECYCLE_READ_CUTOVER off → 26/40 virtual≠persisted; invoice_item_matches table populated

recipeCosting.evidence: 12 recipes / 34 lines executed: 11 PASS / 1 FAIL; 33 line PASS / 1 FAIL; Ginger beer multipack blocks 0-failure bar

uiConsistency.evidence: E2E UI replay: enrichRecipeLinesForOperationalCost + resolveRecipeLineOperationalCost + computeRecipePricingSummaryFromRecipe align on 33/34 lines

sourceOfTruthChain.evidence: invoice overlay → catalog → embed via resolveOperationalIngredientCostFields; never ingredient_price_history; regression +10% Gorgonzola PASS

foundationBlockers.detail: price_history written from unconfirmed suggested match despite confirmed alias; extract gate now blocks re-write
Invoice overlay cost_base_unit=ml; recipe line in un — direct countable path missing; recipe total under-reports vs PDF

syncArtifacts.detail: 12 ingredients history delta/new_price drift from April→May invoices
catalog not refreshed to latest discount economics (totals correct on line)

configurationIssues.detail: Off in VL — virtual match display diverges from persisted invoice_item_matches; 26/40 ingredients affected
Fixture invoice item IDs stale after VL re-extract; negative controls cannot run until IDs refreshed

futureImprovements.detail: Canonical Ingredient Identity — unify alias normalization (prosciutto HC suffix)
Discount-aware monetary binding on re-extract (gross+discount_pct→net unit_price)
Catalog purchase_quantity backfill for produce/countable multipacks
Gate appendIngredientPriceHistory on operational unit cost, not pack price

sourceOfTruth.chain: invoice_items → invoice_item_matches → operationalCostFieldsFromInvoiceLine → resolveOperationalIngredientCostFields → effectiveIngredientUnitCostEur → ingredientLineCostEur

roadmapIfGreen.note: Conditional — complete Ginger beer recipe fix + VL backfill before full green
